description: Introduce a CLI session-source boundary and local/direct runtime integration for session listing, creation, messaging, agents, and live updates.

userStories.title: Define CliSessionSource interface and fake source
userStories.description: As a CLI controller implementer, I need a session-source interface so UI code is decoupled from local or Gateway-backed data sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Define CliSessionSource types for rooms, sessions, create/open session, send message, list agents, set session agent where supported, status, subscribe/update, and close
Implement a fake source for controller and UI tests
Fake source supports deterministic session, agent, status, and trace update fixtures
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented CliSessionSource types and deterministic FakeCliSessionSource with room/session/agent/status/trace fixtures, update subscription behavior, source errors, and cleanup tests. Validation: npm run typecheck; focused cli-session-source test; full npm test.

userStories.title: Implement local session source status and discovery
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want the local source to report available sessions and status so I can choose what to open.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement local/direct source skeleton using existing Pibo runtime/session abstractions where possible
Source can return runtime status with redacted secrets
Source can list sessions and rooms when available, or return clear unsupported/empty states
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented LocalCliSessionSource skeleton over PiboSessionStore with local/direct status, owner-scoped session discovery, metadata-derived room discovery, profile-backed agent listing, secret-redacted status messages, clear unsupported errors for later create/open/send flows, and close behavior. Validation: npm run typecheck; focused cli-session-source test; full npm test.

userStories.title: Implement local session create/open/send flow
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to create or open a session and send messages from the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Local source can create a new session and return a selected session summary
Local source can open a session and expose current trace view or empty state
Local source can send a normal text message to the selected session
Errors are returned as clear source errors instead of uncaught exceptions
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented LocalCliSessionSource create/open/send flow: creates owner-scoped Pibo sessions with room metadata and selected existing profile, opens empty/current local trace views, records normal text messages as compact-row-compatible user trace nodes, and maps source/runtime failures to CliSourceError. Validation: npm run typecheck; focused cli-session-source test; full npm test.

userStories.title: Implement live trace updates and source cleanup
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want the transcript to update while a session is running and clean up when I exit.
acceptanceCriteria: Open session exposes subscription or callback behavior for trace/session updates
Updates provide data compatible with shared compact row generation
Closing the source unsubscribes listeners and releases runtime resources
Tests cover cleanup with fake source
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented local open-session update subscriptions, router-output projection into trace/session updates, idempotent handle/source cleanup, listener-count test hooks, and source close cleanup for subscriptions/router/store resources. Validation: npm run typecheck; focused cli-session-source test; full npm test.

userStories.title: Implement existing agent/profile listing and selection
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want to select an existing Pibo agent/profile without using the Web Agent Designer.
acceptanceCriteria: Source lists available existing profiles/agents from the canonical local profile mechanism
Source applies selected profile to new session flow or current session when supported
Unsupported current-session profile changes return a clear message
No profile create/edit/delete behavior is added
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Local source already lists canonical plugin profiles and now applies selected existing profile/agent to new session creation. Existing-session profile changes validate the target profile then return an explicit unsupported CliSourceError; no profile create/edit/delete behavior was added. Validation: npm run typecheck; focused cli-session-source test; full npm test.
